tasks.subject: T0: Add lock heartbeat config + bump STASH_LOCK_TTL
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 3 new settings + bump STASH_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS from 600 to 1800.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/config.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- STASH_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS: int = 1800
- ARCHIVE_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS: int = 1800
- LOCK_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: int = 300
- LOCK_HEARTBEAT_MAX_DURATION_SECONDS: int = 14400

**Verify:** `python -c "from app.core.config import settings; print(settings.STASH_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS, settings.ARCHIVE_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS, settings.LOCK_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS, settings.LOCK_HEARTBEAT_MAX_DURATION_SECONDS)"` -> `1800 1800 300 14400`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/config.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -c \"from app.core.config import settings; print(settings.STASH_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS, settings.ARCHIVE_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS, settings.LOCK_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS, settings.LOCK_HEARTBEAT_MAX_DURATION_SECONDS)\"","acceptanceCriteria":["STASH_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS=1800","ARCHIVE_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS=1800","LOCK_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS=300","LOCK_HEARTBEAT_MAX_DURATION_SECONDS=14400"]}
```

tasks.subject: T1: Implement _LockHeartbeat helper + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Async context manager that renews Redis lock TTL via Lua CAS while op runs.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py (insert after _release_ownership_lock at line 1978)
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_lock_heartbeat.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Async context manager (`__aenter__` starts task, `__aexit__` cancels + awaits)
- Lua CAS refresh: only EXPIRE if value matches expected
- max_duration_seconds cap stops renewals
- Value mismatch stops renewals
- Transient Redis errors tolerated
- asyncio.CancelledError swallowed cleanly
- 5 unit tests pass

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_lock_heartbeat.py -v` -> 5 passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_lock_heartbeat.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_lock_heartbeat.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Async context manager","Lua CAS refresh","max_duration cap","value-mismatch stop","transient redis error tolerated","CancelledError swallowed","5 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: T2: Wrap stash_crawl tar+cleanup block with _LockHeartbeat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Integrate heartbeat in stash_crawl tar + Redis update + cleanup block.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py (stash_crawl around lines 2065-2199)
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `async with _LockHeartbeat(...)` wraps tar + stashed_at + cleanup
- Existing `finally: _release_ownership_lock` preserved
- All existing stash tests pass
- test_stash_lock_survives_long_tar passes
- test_stash_lock_released_on_replica_crash_simulation passes

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v` -> all pass

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["async with _LockHeartbeat wraps tar+cleanup","Existing tests pass","Long-tar test passes","Crash sim test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: T3: Migrate archive_lock to ownership-safe + heartbeat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace constant-value SET NX + raw DEL with `_acquire_ownership_lock`/`_release_ownership_lock` pair + heartbeat wrapper. Preserve PHP cron caller contract.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py (archive_crawl lines 1678-1851)
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Archive uses `_acquire_ownership_lock(archive_lock_key, settings.ARCHIVE_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS)`
- Release uses `_release_ownership_lock` (ownership-safe Lua DEL)
- Tar wrapped in `_LockHeartbeat`
- 409 string `Archiving for crawl '{id}' is already in progress.` preserved
- 409 string `has already been archived` preserved (PHP regex match dependency)
- 200 response shape unchanged
- 3 new tests pass

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -k archive -v` -> all pass

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -k archive -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Ownership-safe lock","Heartbeat wraps tar","409 strings preserved","200 shape preserved","3 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: T4: Disable nginx upstream POST retry on /stash + /unstash + /archive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add regex location before /crawler/ prefix in both gateways to intercept stash/unstash/archive with proxy_next_upstream off.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/api-gateway-go/nginx.conf
- Modify: apps-microservices/api-gateway/nginx.conf

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Regex `~ ^/crawler/(stash|unstash|archive)/` block added before prefix `/crawler/` in both files
- proxy_next_upstream off
- proxy_read_timeout 14400s, proxy_send_timeout 14400s, proxy_connect_timeout 60s
- Standard proxy headers preserved
- Existing `/crawler/` block unchanged
- nginx -t passes on both

**Verify:**
```
docker run --rm -v $PWD/apps-microservices/api-gateway-go/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro nginx:alpine nginx -t
docker run --rm -v $PWD/apps-microservices/api-gateway/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro nginx:alpine nginx -t
```

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/api-gateway-go/nginx.conf","apps-microservices/api-gateway/nginx.conf"],"verifyCommand":"docker run --rm -v $PWD/apps-microservices/api-gateway-go/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro nginx:alpine nginx -t && docker run --rm -v $PWD/apps-microservices/api-gateway/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro nginx:alpine nginx -t","acceptanceCriteria":["Regex location ahead of prefix in both files","proxy_next_upstream off","proxy_read_timeout 14400s","Existing block unchanged","nginx -t passes on both"]}
```
